title: 10 best herbal essential oils for hypothyroidism
intro_desc: Herbal essential oils for hypothyroidism are a blend of plant extracts used to support thyroid health and alleviate symptoms associated with this condition. These oils are derived from specific herbs that have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine to boost thyroid function. The best herbal essential oils for hypothyroidism include Astragalus membranaceus, Withania somnifera, Schisandra chinensis, Cassia auriculata, Silybum marianum, Panax ginseng, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Boswellia serrata, Curcuma longa, and Gymnema sylvestre. If left untreated, hypothyroidism can lead to fatigue, weight gain, hair loss, and impaired cognitive function, significantly impacting one's quality of life, relationships, and overall well-being.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ashwagandha essential oils helps with hypothyroidism because it possesses adaptogenic properties that help regulate the body's response to stress, which is often linked to thyroid dysfunction. The oil's anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties also help reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland and promote its normal functioning. Additionally, ashwagandha's ability to stimulate the production of thyroid hormones helps alleviate symptoms such as fatigue, weight gain, and cold intolerance associated with hypothyroidism, promoting overall hormonal balance and well-being.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic: Ashwagandha essential oil has adaptogenic properties, which means it can help the body adapt to stress and anxiety, which are common symptoms associated with hypothyroidism.

Antioxidant: Ashwagandha essential oil is rich in antioxidants, which can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, potentially alleviating symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue, dry skin, and hair loss.

Thyroid-stimulating: Some studies suggest that ashwagandha may have a thyroid-stimulating effect, possibly due to its ability to increase the production of thyroid hormones, which can help regulate metabolism and alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, ashwagandha roots are used to create essential oils that support thyroid function and overall well-being.
Seeds: Ashwagandha seeds contain anti-inflammatory properties that help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism, such as fatigue and joint pain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh withania somnifera roots in the morning after dew has dried.
Dry the harvested roots in a well-ventilated area for 7 days.
Steam distill 100 grams of dried withania somnifera root in 500 milliliters of water for 30 minutes.
Collect and filter the resulting essential oil through cheesecloth or coffee filters.
Bottle and store the final product in a dark glass container at room temperature for up to one year.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Burdock essential oils helps with hypothyroidism because they stimulate the thyroid gland, improving its function and increasing production of hormones. The oil's antioxidant properties help reduce inflammation in the thyroid tissue, which is often associated with hypothyroidism. Additionally, burdock essential oil's adaptogenic properties allow it to support the body's natural response to stress, which can contribute to thyroid dysfunction. By promoting a healthy thyroid gland, burdock essential oils may help alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue, weight gain, and dry skin.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Burdock essential oil's antioxidant properties can help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, which are often associated with hypothyroidism and can contribute to its symptoms.

Adaptogenic properties: Burdock essential oil's adaptogenic properties allow it to help balance and regulate the body's response to stress, which is particularly important for hypothyroid individuals who may experience increased stress levels that worsen their condition.

Thyroid-stimulating properties: Some studies suggest that burdock root (not necessarily essential oil) may have thyroid-stimulating properties, potentially helping to increase thyroid hormone production and alleviate symptoms of hypothyroidism.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in inulin, a prebiotic fiber that supports gut health and thyroid function.
Seeds: Contain lignans with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, beneficial for reducing inflammation and oxidative stress associated with hypothyroidism.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality arctium lappa leaves and stems in the early morning dew for optimal potency.
Dry the harvested plant material using a food dehydrator at 40°c for 48 hours to preserve its active compounds.
Chop the dried plant material into small pieces and store them in an airtight container for later use.
Combine one part chopped arctium lappa with four parts carrier oil such as coconut or sweet almond oil in a clean glass jar.
Steep the mixture in a dark place at room temperature for 14 days, shaking the jar daily to facilitate extraction of essential oils.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile essential oils helps with hypothyroidism because of its calming and soothing properties, which can help to reduce stress and anxiety that are often associated with thyroid disorders. The anti-inflammatory compounds in chamomile oil may also help to alleviate symptoms such as fatigue, dry skin, and mood changes by promoting a sense of relaxation and well-being. Additionally, the antioxidant properties of chamomile oil may help to protect against oxidative damage in the body, which can further support thyroid health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory: Chamomile essential oil has anti-inflammatory properties that can help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress, which can contribute to thyroid dysfunction in hypothyroidism.
Anxiolytic: The calming effects of chamomile essential oil can help alleviate anxiety and stress, which are common symptoms associated with hypothyroidism, and may also help improve sleep quality.

Antioxidant: Chamomile essential oil is rich in antioxidants that can protect the thyroid gland from damage caused by free radicals and oxidative stress, potentially helping to improve thyroid function.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh matricaria chamomilla flowers at dawn for optimal oil quality and potency.
Dry the harvested flowers in a warm oven on low heat for three hours or air-dried for seven days.
Combine 500 grams of dried matricaria chamomilla flowers with 1 liter of carrier oil such as sweet almond or grapeseed oil in a clean glass jar.
Infuse the mixture at room temperature for 21 days, shaking the jar daily to ensure even extraction.
Filter and decant the infused oil through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a dark glass bottle, storing it in a cool dry place.

Cleanse the harvested material by gently rinsing with filtered water and air-drying it for at least 24 hours.
Steam distill the dried material using a high-quality still and a neutral carrier oil such as jojoba or sweet almond oil.
Monitor the distillation process for approximately 2-3 hours to extract the optimal amount of essential oil containing taraxasterol and taraxadienone compounds.
Filter and store the extracted essential oil in dark glass bottles at room temperature with a minimum shelf life of six months to preserve its potency.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of dried croton lechleri leaves and stems in the morning when they are at their peak potency.
Steam-distill the herb mixture for 4 hours in a copper still using 500 milliliters of distilled water.
Filter the essential oil from the distillation residue through a coffee filter into a glass bottle.
Store the freshly produced croton lechleri essential oil in a dark amber glass bottle at room temperature for 2 weeks.
Dilute the essential oil with 10% jojoba oil to create a stable and shelf-life extended formula.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree essential oils helps with hypothyroidism because it contains compounds that stimulate the thyroid gland, increasing production of thyroid hormones. remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ginkgo biloba leaves in the fall season ensuring sufficient quantity for the recipe.
Dry the harvested ginkgo biloba leaves using a dehydrator or air-drying method for 24 hours.
Combine one pound of dried ginkgo biloba leaves with three cups of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil and let it steep for eight to ten days.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean glass container discarding the solids and store in a cool dark place for four weeks.
Check the oil's color clarity and potency before using it topically at a 2-3% dilution ratio or adding it to your bath water as needed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenseal essential oils helps with hypothyroidism because of its unique blend of bioactive compounds, particularly berberine and hydrastine. remedy_recipe: Gather dried goldenseal root powder weighing 20 grams for optimal thyroid support.

Steam distill the dried camellia sinensis material using 100 grams of steam per hour for 2-3 hours to extract the essential oil.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh crataegus monogyna leaves and flowers in the early morning or late evening when their aromatic properties are most potent.

Filter the essential oil through a coffee filter or cheesecloth to remove any impurities and sediment, and store it in dark glass bottles with tight-fitting lids at room temperature.

Use the crataegus monogyna essential oil as directed by a healthcare professional for hypothyroidism relief, typically 5-10 drops per day mixed with carrier oils or diffused into the air for 30 minutes to an hour twice daily.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat hypothyroidism with herbal essential oils is by incorporating specific blends that stimulate thyroid function. Distill the macerated mixture using a steam distillation apparatus for 2-4 hours to obtain the essential oil.

Allow the mixture to separate and then carefully pour the essential oil from the top layer into a dark bottle.
Store the essential oil in a cool dark place for at least 2 weeks before use to mature and stabilize.

remedy_recipe: Harvest 500g of glycyrrhiza glabra roots in the early morning when the plant is at its highest moisture content.
Steam distill the harvested roots with 3kg of water at 100°c for 3 hours to extract the oil.
Collect the distilled oil and separate it from the water using a condenser and a separator.
Filter the extracted oil through a 0.2 micron filter to remove any impurities and improve its clarity.
Store the final product in a dark glass bottle with a tight-fitting lid at a temperature below 30°c.

remedies.remedy_desc: Boswellia serrata essential oils helps with hypothyroidism because it contains anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce inflammation in the thyroid gland, allowing it to function properly. Additionally, Boswellia serrata's ability to improve circulation may help to increase the delivery of oxygen and nutrients to the thyroid gland, supporting its proper functioning and potentially alleviating symptoms of hypothyroidism such as fatigue and weight gain. This makes it a promising natural remedy for hypothyroidism.
remedy_constituents: Acetyl-11-keto-β-boswellic acid (AKBA): It helps alleviate thyroid issues by reducing inflammation, which is often associated with hypothyroidism, and promoting the production of thyroid hormones.

Boswellic acids: These compounds have been shown to regulate thyroid function and improve thyroid hormone levels by reducing the production of thyroid-peroxidase antibodies, which can contribute to hypothyroidism.

remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Boswellia serrata are commonly used to make essential oils for hypothyroidism because they contain boswellic acids, which have anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate thyroid-related inflammation.

Resin or sap from roots: This part is sometimes considered a separate entity, however it is produced by the roots of the tree. The resin is commonly used to make essential oils for hypothyroidism because it contains boswellic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that may help support thyroid health.

Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of Boswellia serrata are used to make essential oils for hypothyroidism because they contain boswellic acids, which may help reduce inflammation and promote overall thyroid function.
remedy_recipe: Harvest boswellia serrata resin in the early morning after the night dew has evaporated completely.
Steam distill the collected resin in a vacuum distillation apparatus at a temperature range of 70-110 degrees celsius for 4-6 hours.
Collect the distilled essential oil and separate it from the water using a separator funnel or a distillation apparatus with a built-in separator.
Filter the essential oil through a paper filter or a glass filter to remove any impurities and particles.

remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh turmeric roots at peak maturity with 2-3 inches of stem and 2-3 pounds of roots.
Clean the roots thoroughly with water and allow them to dry for 2-3 hours in warm air.

Collect the distilled essential oil in a clean glass container and filter it through a paper filter.
